channel.title: DashDock Updates
channel.description: DashDock — Real-time Google Analytics, AdSense & Search Console for your Mac Desktop.

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
DashDock v1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Real-time Google Analytics 4 monitoring (active users, pageviews, sessions)
  • AdSense revenue tracking with daily trends
  • Multi-account switching in the menu bar popover
  • Comparative analytics with sparklines and trend badges
  • Polar billing with license activation via dashdock://activate URL scheme
  • Sparkle auto-update from realitech.dev
  • Universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel)
